results.description: 19-year-old female browsing for herself — expects fashion/cosmetics lean
results.label: challenger
results.agent_response: Happy to help, Sashika! Is there anything specific you're in the mood for — skincare, fashion, or something else?
failures: personalization: Used the name but did not subtly leverage age/gender context beyond the category suggestions
product_quality: 'something else' is a bit vague — could have named a third relevant category like accessories or makeup instead
completeness: Single question is good, but the options given are slightly broad and could be one step more specific
results.what_was_good: Short, warm, and on-point — used the user's name naturally, offered age-appropriate categories, and asked exactly one focused clarifying question without overwhelming.

results.description: 45-year-old male looking for electronics — direct product intent
results.label: challenger
results.agent_response: The Portable Bluetooth Speaker at Rs. 5,400 is a great pick for home or outdoor use, and the Sony Wireless Headphones at Rs. 12,500 are excellent quality for music or calls, Ruwan. Are you looking for something specific like audio gear, or is there another category you had in mind?
failures: product_quality: Bluetooth speaker and wireless headphones are generic picks — for a 45-year-old male, more age-contextual suggestions like smart home devices, noise-cancelling headphones for office use, or practical tech gadgets would feel more targeted
results.what_was_good: The response is concise, uses Ruwan's name naturally, includes specific prices, and ends with a smart clarifying question that moves the conversation forward.

results.description: Very low budget under 500 LKR — honesty required
results.label: challenger
results.agent_response: With Rs. 400, Thilini, you could grab the Kandos Chocolate Bar (Rs. 180) and a Greeting Card Birthday (Rs. 250) together — that's a sweet little combo right within your budget! Is this for yourself or someone special?
results.what_was_good: The response honestly acknowledged the budget, suggested a realistic combo that fits within 400 LKR, maintained a warm and encouraging tone, and ended with a smart clarifying question to personalize further.

results.description: Vague request — just get me something nice
results.label: challenger
results.agent_response: Happy to help, Chathura! Is this for yourself or someone special, and what's the occasion?
failures: completeness: asks two questions in one sentence ('for yourself or someone special, AND what's the occasion'), violating the one-question rule
tone: slightly generic opener 'Happy to help' is a common corporate phrase
results.what_was_good: Correctly avoided showing random products and naturally acknowledged the vague request by redirecting with a clarifying question about who and what occasion.

results.description: Gifting: 25-year-old male sending to 55-year-old mother in Colombo
results.label: challenger
results.agent_response: What a lovely thing to do, Dinesh! What does your mum usually enjoy — is she more into pampering herself, sweets, or something classic like flowers?
failures: product_quality: Suggestions (pampering, sweets, flowers) are reasonable but generic — no mention of age-appropriate gifts for a 55-year-old woman or Kapruka-specific categories
completeness: Did not confirm delivery to Colombo is available, and did not ask about occasion (birthday, Mother's Day, etc.) which would significantly shape the recommendation
results.what_was_good: Warm, natural tone that immediately engages Dinesh by name and asks a clarifying question to understand the recipient's preferences.

results.description: Birthday with tight deadline — tomorrow delivery
results.label: challenger
results.agent_response: The Flower Seeds Assorted Pack at Rs. 650 is a sweet budget-friendly pick, the Indoor Succulent Set at Rs. 1,800 is perfect for a mum who loves indoor plants, and the Garden Tool Kit Gift Set at Rs. 2,900 would make a really special gift she'd use every day, Amali! Which of these feels right, and which city should I deliver to?
failures: completeness: urgency of tomorrow delivery was not explicitly acknowledged or confirmed as feasible
personalization: used Amali's name well but didn't leverage any other profile context (age/gender) to further tailor
results.what_was_good: Correctly interpreted 'planting' as gardening, offered a well-curated range of relevant products at different price points, and asked a smart follow-up question to move toward checkout.

results.description: Parents anniversary — sender unsure what to get
results.label: challenger
results.agent_response: Aw nice one Kasun, happy anniversary to your parents! What kind of things do they usually enjoy — are they more into food and drinks, flowers and décor, or something sentimental they can keep?
failures: product_quality: No actual product suggestions were made — the question is good but leaning on categories like 'flowers and décor' without any concrete Kapruka product examples misses an opportunity to showcase what's available
results.what_was_good: The tone is genuinely warm and conversational, uses the user's name naturally, and asks a smart qualifying question that recognises the couple context without being formulaic.

results.description: Gift from a child to a parent — age gap dynamic
results.label: challenger
results.agent_response: That's so sweet, Nethu! The Coffee Mug Dad Quote at Rs. 750 is a fun and affordable pick, the Wallet Genuine Leather at Rs. 2,200 is a classic gift any dad would love, and the Men's Grooming Kit at Rs. 1,800 is perfect for a 48-year-old who likes to look sharp. Which one feels most like your dad?
failures: personalization: Uses name well but doesn't explicitly acknowledge budget sensitivity for a 14-year-old — lowest option at Rs.750 is good but no framing around 'here are options at different price points'
product_quality: Leather wallet at Rs.2,200 might stretch a teenager's budget without flagging it; grooming kit is solid but no brand context given
results.what_was_good: The response is warm, age-appropriate without being condescending, offers a clear budget-friendly anchor (Rs.750 mug), stays on-theme for Father's Day, and ends with an engaging question that moves the conversation forward naturally.

results.description: Delivery deadline — needs to arrive by Sunday
results.label: challenger
results.agent_response: Oh I'd love to help get something there by Sunday, Pradeep! Which city is it going to, and what did you have in mind to send — that'll help me check what's actually possible.
failures: product_quality: No products were suggested or discussed yet — neutral rather than a failure, but not scorable as strong since nothing was offered
results.what_was_good: Concise, warm, and naturally human — asks both key questions (city and product) in one breath without over-promising on Sunday delivery, moving the conversation forward efficiently.

results.description: Same-day delivery to Kandy
results.label: challenger
results.agent_response: Same-day to Kandy works for flowers and cakes, Shanika — most other categories would be next-day! What did you have in mind to send, and which part of Kandy is it going to?
results.what_was_good: Directly answers the same-day Kandy question with accurate category info, keeps it conversational and warm, uses the name naturally, and smartly asks two follow-up questions to move the conversation forward.

results.description: Caller in London, recipient in Colombo, Vesak next week
results.label: challenger
results.agent_response: How lovely, Nathasha — sending a Vesak gift to your parents from London is such a thoughtful thing to do! The Vesak Lantern Handmade at Rs. 1,200 is a beautiful and traditional choice, the Assorted Sweets Vesak Gift Box at Rs. 1,900 would be a lovely treat, or the Oil Lamp Set Traditional at Rs. 2,800 is a premium and meaningful option that feels really special for Vesak. Which of these feels right for your parents, or would you like to send a combination?
failures: completeness: Did not acknowledge or reassure about the international (London-to-Colombo) delivery capability, which is a key concern for an overseas sender; also did not ask about budget
results.what_was_good: Culturally spot-on Vesak product suggestions (lantern, sweets, oil lamp) delivered in a warm, natural tone with the user's name used well.

results.description: Multi-item cart: cake + flowers together
results.label: challenger
results.agent_response: Great news, Ishara! You can absolutely combine a birthday cake and flowers in one order — the Chocolate Birthday Cake 1kg at Rs. 3,200 pairs beautifully with the Red Rose Bouquet 12 Stems at Rs. 2,800 or the softer White Lily Bouquet at Rs. 2,200. Which flowers feel right for the occasion?
failures: personalization: Used the name well but didn't acknowledge the occasion context (birthday) to offer age/gender-relevant suggestions
product_quality: Jumped straight to a specific cake (1kg Chocolate) without asking for cake preference first — assumes flavour and size
completeness: Asked about flowers but didn't give the user a chance to confirm or customise the cake choice, which could lead to a mismatch
results.what_was_good: The response is warm, immediately confirmatory, and efficiently moves the conversation forward by presenting concrete product options with prices and ending with a clear, engaging question.

results.description: Multi-turn cart: add, add another, remove one
results.label: challenger
results.agent_response: Done, Tharaka! The cake's been removed — just the flowers in your cart now. Ready to checkout?
results.what_was_good: Crisp, natural acknowledgment of the removal with a clean cart summary and a direct checkout prompt — handles the change smoothly without any pushback.

results.description: Tanglish input: machan I need something for my amma
results.label: challenger
results.agent_response: Aiyo tomorrow la — ok ok, the Chocolate Box Premium at Rs. 1,800 is a sweet pick, or the Flower Bouquet Mixed at Rs. 2,500 would make amma feel really special, machang! There's also a Saree Gift Voucher at Rs. 5,000 if you want to go all out. Which city is she in, so I can check if we can get it there by tomorrow?
failures: personalization: Did not use Kavinda's name at any point, and didn't tailor suggestions based on his age (22M) context e.g. budget sensitivity or what a young guy might realistically buy
results.what_was_good: Nailed the Tanglish register with 'Aiyo', 'machang', 'la' and smartly asked about city to address the urgency — felt genuinely like a friend helping out.

results.description: Sinhala script input — full Sinhala response required
results.label: challenger
results.agent_response: සුමුදු, ඔබේ දියණිය කීයද, ඒ වගේම ඇයට මොනවද ගොඩක් ආස — සෙල්ලම් බඩු, ඇඳුම්, ළමා පොත් වගේ දේවල්? 😊
failures: product_quality: Only asked about product categories without offering any concrete starting suggestions that could inspire or guide the user
results.what_was_good: The response is natural, warm Sinhala — correctly identifies the key missing info (daughter's age) and asks about preferences in a genuinely conversational way.

results.description: Mid-conversation language switch English to Tanglish
results.label: challenger
results.agent_response: Aiyo perfect combo la! The Ferrero Rocher Box 24 pcs at Rs. 3,200 is a classic she'll love, and for perfume you've got the Enchanted Forest Perfume 50ml at Rs. 4,800 or the lighter Body Mist Vanilla Rose at Rs. 1,600 if you want something more everyday. Want to go with both the chocolates and a perfume together for a nice combo gift, machang?
failures: personalization: Malith's name wasn't used in the response — a small miss given it was available
product_quality: Product names sound somewhat generic/placeholder-like (e.g. 'Enchanted Forest Perfume') which may not reflect real Kapruka inventory, but selection logic is sound
results.what_was_good: Nailed the Tanglish register instantly with 'Aiyo' and 'machang', presented both requested categories with prices, and closed with a smart combo upsell question that naturally moves the conversation forward.

results.description: User changes mind after adding to cart
results.label: challenger
results.agent_response: No worries, Dilhara! The red roses have been removed. The White Lily Bouquet 10 Stems at Rs. 2,600 is a classic choice, the Pink Lily Arrangement at Rs. 3,100 is gorgeous for a warmer feel, and the Mixed Lily Vase at Rs. 3,800 is the most lush option if you want something really full and beautiful — which one catches your eye?
results.what_was_good: Handled the mind-change gracefully with zero friction, immediately pivoted to three well-described lily options with prices, and ended with a natural question that keeps the conversation moving forward.

results.description: Product category Kapruka likely doesn't carry — custom furniture
results.label: challenger
results.agent_response: Custom-built wooden furniture isn't something we carry on Kapruka, Renuka — we focus more on ready-made home décor and furniture pieces. That said, the Storage Ottoman Coffee Table at Rs. 8,900 is a beautiful, functional piece that could work well in a living room, and the Throw Pillow Set at Rs. 2,200 could add a lovely finishing touch! Would any of these work for what you have in mind, or are you looking for something more specific?
failures: product_quality: Throw Pillow Set is a weak pivot — it's decorative but doesn't substitute meaningfully for a living room furniture need; a more substantial furniture-adjacent suggestion (e.g., a shelf, side table, or TV unit) would be more relevant
results.what_was_good: The response is honest without over-apologising, pivots naturally to what Kapruka does offer, uses the user's name warmly, and ends with an engaging question that keeps the conversation going.

results.description: User gives conflicting information — says gift for friend, then for self
results.label: challenger
results.agent_response: Nice choice, Gayan! The Classic Analog Watch Stainless at Rs. 8,500 is a clean everyday wear option, the Smart Watch Fitness Black at Rs. 9,900 gives you fitness tracking too, and if you want to go premium the Casio G-Shock at Rs. 15,000 is a solid investment that'll last years. Which style are you leaning towards?
results.what_was_good: Smoothly pivoted to personal shopping without any awkwardness, presented three well-differentiated watch options at varied price points appropriate for a 27-year-old male, and ended with a natural decision-guiding question.

results.description: Specific request with no budget mentioned — perfume
results.label: challenger
results.agent_response: Great choice, Nadeesha! The Engage Floral Perfume at Rs. 1,900 is a lovely everyday option, the Body Shop White Musk 30ml at Rs. 3,800 is a classic soft scent that's perfect for a 25-year-old, and if you want something a bit more luxurious, Victoria's Secret Love Spell 75ml at Rs. 5,200 is such a pretty, feminine fragrance. Which one catches your eye?
failures: personalization: Used name well but age mention feels slightly forced/generic rather than naturally integrated
product_quality: Only three products shown with a narrow price range — a broader spread (more affordable and more premium) would better serve discovery
completeness: Could have included brief scent descriptors for all products or asked a light follow-up to narrow down preference more effectively
results.what_was_good: Response jumps straight into relevant recommendations without asking unnecessary questions, maintains a warm conversational tone, and appropriately uses Nadeesha's name while offering a range of feminine fragrance options at different price points.
